description: Alleniella complanata, the flat Neckera, is a species of moss belonging to the family Neckeraceae. This species of moss was found in the colon of the Tyrolean Iceman.
Exsertotheca crispa, crisped neckera, is a species of moss belonging to the family Neckeraceae.

Neckera pennata is a species of moss belonging to the family Neckeraceae.
Thamnobryum alopecurum is a species of moss belonging to the family Neckeraceae.
